name: axonflow-governance
description: Governs Claude Desktop's MCP tool calls: enforces AxonFlow Decision Mode policy on every call, redacts PII from responses, and audits everything.
long_description:
AxonFlow Governance is an MCP proxy for Claude Desktop. It fronts your internal MCP servers (CRM, BigQuery, back-office) and, on every `tools/call`, checks the call against AxonFlow Decision Mode (`POST /api/v1/decide`) before forwarding it. Policy-violating calls are blocked, PII is redacted from tool responses before it reaches the conversation, and every call is written to a Layer-1 audit trail with a `decision_id`/`trace_id` for SIEM correlation.

Claude Desktop has no PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks (those are Claude Code only) — the MCP layer is the only pre-execution interception point, so enforcement lives in this proxy. The proxy fails CLOSED by default: if the policy service is unreachable, tool calls are blocked.

axonflow_endpoint.title: AxonFlow endpoint
axonflow_endpoint.description: Base URL of your AxonFlow Decision API, e.g. https://app.getaxonflow.com:8090

client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.description: AxonFlow client identifier — sent as the HTTP Basic auth username. In enterprise / in-vpc-enterprise mode this MUST be your AxonFlow org id (the org the license was issued to).

client_secret.title: Client secret
client_secret.description: AxonFlow client secret — sent as the HTTP Basic auth password. In enterprise / in-vpc-enterprise mode this is your Enterprise license key. Leave blank in community mode (no auth).

user_token.title: User token (enterprise JWT)
user_token.description: Optional enterprise JWT for the Desktop user, so the audit row carries the validated user. Leave blank to use a service identity.

tenant_id.title: Tenant ID
tenant_id.description: AxonFlow tenant this Desktop fleet belongs to.

org_id.title: Org ID
org_id.description: AxonFlow org identifier (optional; the authenticated identity is authoritative).

fail_mode.title: Fail mode
fail_mode.description: What to do when the policy service is unreachable. 'closed' (recommended, default) blocks the tool call; 'open' forwards the call without policy enforcement (response PII redaction is still applied as a safety net, unless AXONFLOW_REDACT_RESPONSES=off). Fintech deployments should keep this 'closed'.

leader_email.title: Leader email
leader_email.description: The Desktop user's email, stamped on every audit row and forwarded to the policy service for SIEM correlation.

backends_file.title: Backend MCP servers (config file)
backends_file.description: Path to a JSON file describing the backend MCP servers to front. See config.example.json. At least one backend is required.

audit_log.title: Audit log path
audit_log.description: Optional path to an append-only JSONL file for the Layer-1 audit trail. Leave blank to log to the extension's stderr only.
